hero.title: Sẽn nan yɩll tɩ b tõog n paam b sẽn datã
hero.lead: IATF sõngda lagem-n-taar dãmba, sull dãmba, la nin-yend fãa tɩ b lebg neb sẽn tõe n paam b sẽn datã, n lebg nin-buiida tʋʋm-teedo.
support: Tʋʋm nins b sẽn sakã b yiisda IATF GitHub siglg pʋgẽ ne copyleft lisãnse la b sigl-b-la zãma wã sʋk ne injinɛɛr sẽn tar zɩɩbo.

header.kicker: Zãma wã sẽn tʋmd to-to wã
header.title: Ned fãa tõe n paamame t'a tõe n ges porze rãmb nins b sẽn yiisdã

paragraphs: Ne sebre, ned kam fãa tõe n wilga IATF sẽn yaa bũmb ning sẽn tõe n kɩt tɩ ned pa tõe n paam n kẽ, tɩ sullã sã n tõe n maan dẽ, b na n paka zãma wã GitHub bĩng sẽn na yɩl n maan tʋʋm-kãnga.
Tʋʋmd ning fãa b sẽn sakã tara zĩig sẽn yaa vẽenese, b sẽn tõe n yã koodã, yel-kãsemsã, sɛbã la b sẽn yiisd-b to-to wã, t'a yel-bũndã na n yɩ nin-buiid taoor soaba.

specCard.title: Zãma wã sẽn tʋmd to-to wã

terms.definition: Tʋʋmdã sẽn zems ne tʋʋmdã la a sẽn tõe n yɩ to-to

header.title: A sẽn maand to-to
header.intro: Modellã yaa bilf ne yamleoogo, sẽn na yɩl tɩ nebã tõe n tũ sorã nana-nana.

steps.title: B wilga b sẽn datã
paragraphs: Yaa sull bɩ sull bɩ nin-yend n tõe n kõ kosg sẽn tik bũmb ning sẽn sɩd yaa tɩlae sẽn kẽed ne b sẽn tõe n paam b sẽn datã.
Y tõe n sɩnga y kosgã ne ẽntɛrnetã zugu, wall ne e-mail ning b sẽn gʋls tɩ: contact@iatf.cc, bɩ y tũnug ne Discordã.

steps.title: IATF vaeesd-a lame
paragraphs: D vaeesda tʋʋm-noorã sẽn zems to-to, a sẽn tõe n yɩ bũmb ning pʋgẽ, la a sã n zemsa ne zãma wã sẽn na n tũnug ne seb-vãoog sẽn yaa vẽenegã.

steps.title: B na n maana zãma wã sɛb b sẽn na n tall n bĩngã
paragraphs: B sã n sak n deeg tʋʋmde, b yiisda-a-la IATF GitHub siglg pʋgẽ ne copyleft lisãnse.
Zĩ-kãng lebgda b sẽn boond tɩ code wã, b sẽn yiisd-a wã, la b sẽn gʋls-a to-to wã zĩig neba fãa yĩnga.

steps.title: Yaa inɛgnɛɛr n na n ges tʋʋmdã yelle
paragraphs: B yãkda nin-saamb sẽn na n ges tʋʋm-no-kãnga yelle, la b maand-a-la zãma wã taoore.

header.title: Bao-y n bãng-y tʋʋm nins y sẽn maand masã wã, bɩ y sɩng tʋʋm takɩ

paragraphs: Sõng-y-yã-a n ges bũmb nins sẽn zoe n be neba fãa nifẽ wã, bɩ y sɩng n bao n bãng b sã n na n wa lebga tʋʋm-noy sẽn na n sõng nebã tɩ b bãng b sẽn tõe n maan to-to.
